condition.description: Defines a condition under which the IAM binding applies, specifying attributes like title, description, and expression.

member.description: Specifies the identity to be granted the IAM role, such as a user, group, or service account.

role.description: Defines the IAM role assigned to the member for the Pub/Sub topic, specifying their level of access.

topic.description: Defines the Pub/Sub topic to which the IAM policy member will be applied; must be the name or fully qualified identifier of an existing topic.
